repo.description: [IEEE RA-L & ICRA'22] A lightweight and computationally-efficient frontend LiDAR odometry solution with consistent and accurate localization.

terms.context_snippet: DLO is a lightweight and computationally-efficient frontend LiDAR odometry solution with consistent and accurate localization. It features several algorithmic innovations that increase speed, accuracy, and robustness of pose estimation in perceptually-challenging environments an…
